name: spec_challenge_quality_result
description: Report the findings of adversarial plan review. Call this tool after completing the review analysis.

has_fatal_flaws.description: Whether any fatal flaws were found that would make the plan unreliable if not resolved

fatal_flaw_count.description: Number of fatal flaws identified (0 if none)

fatal_flaw_topics.description: One-phrase topic for each fatal flaw, e.g. ['missing idempotency in payment retry', 'no distributed rollback for inventory']. Empty array if no fatal flaws.

blind_spot_count.description: Number of blind spot annotations identified (scenarios the plan does not cover)

conclusion_verdict.description: The review conclusion: pass (no fatal flaws, plan is sound), conditional-pass (must resolve F1-FN before implementation), reject (fundamental rework required)

review_content.description: The complete review report text following the prescribed output format (Fatal Flaws, Improvement Suggestions, Blind Spot Annotations, Conclusion)
